revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御霊神社]][[zh:御靈神社]]
'''Goryō Shrine''' (御霊神社, also pronounced *Goryō Jinja*, *Gorei Jinja*, or *Mitama Jinja*) is a type of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} named after the concept of "Goryō" (御霊), meaning honored spirits or venerated souls.
The deities (saijin) and nature of these shrines vary, reflecting different aspects of {{ill|Goryō|en|Goryō|qid=Q3273210|lt=Goryō belief|1=Goryō}}. Some Goryō Shrines were established to appease the spirits of specific individuals, particularly vengeful spirits (怨霊), believed to cause misfortune. Others enshrine five divine spirits (五霊, *Goryō*) as a collective or may honor ancestral spirits (*Mikage* or *Mitama*) under the title of "Goryō" (御霊).
== Tōhoku Region == * [[Tadano Moto Shrines]] (Fukushima Prefecture, Kōriyama City) – Enshrines Kamakura Kagesada as Goryō Daimyōjin.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Shinjuku Ward)|wikidata|Q121826527|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Shinjuku Ward)|qq=}} - Located in [[Nakai, Shinjuku]], {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}. Enshrines {{ill|Emperor Chūai|en|Emperor Chūai|qid=Q179971|lt=Emperor Chūai|1=Emperor Chūai}}, {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, {{ill|Empress Jingū|en|Empress Jingū|qid=Q232803|lt=Empress Jingū|1=Empress Jingū}}, {{ill|Emperor Nintoku|en|Emperor Nintoku|qid=Q313119|lt=Emperor Nintoku|1=Emperor Nintoku}}, and [[Takemikazuchi no Mikoto]]. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Hachiōji City)|ja|御霊神社 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Hachiōji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504378|1=Goryō Shrine (Hachiōji City)}} - Located in Hachiōji City, Tokyo. Enshrines Kamakura Kagesada. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kamakura City)|ja|御霊神社 (鎌倉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kamakura City)|qq=}} - Located in Sakanoshita, Kamakura City, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. Also known as (Kamakura) Gongo Shrine. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kajiwara, Kamakura)|ja|御霊神社 (鎌倉市梶原)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kajiwara, Kamakura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504382|1=Goryō Shrine (Kajiwara, Kamakura)}} - Located in Kajiwara, Kamakura City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|御霊神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504389|1=Goryō Shrine (Kawasaki City)}} - Located in Kawasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kawana, Fujisawa)|ja|御霊神社 (藤沢市川名)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kawana, Fujisawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504391|1=Goryō Shrine (Kawana, Fujisawa)}} - Located in Kawana, Fujisawa City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Miyamae, Fujisawa)|ja|御霊神社 (藤沢市宮前)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Miyamae, Fujisawa)|qq=}} - Located in Miyamae, Fujisawa City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hatori Gorei Shrine|ja|御霊神社 (藤沢市羽鳥)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatori Gorei Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Hatori, Fujisawa City, Kanagawa Prefecture. Commonly known as Hatori Shrine. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Chigasaki City)|ja|御霊神社 (茅ヶ崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Chigasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504393|1=Goryō Shrine (Chigasaki City)}} - Located in Nanko, Chigasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Fujino Town)|ja|御霊神社 (藤野町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Fujino Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504395|1=Goryō Shrine (Fujino Town)}}. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Hayama Town)|ja|御霊神社 (葉山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Hayama Town)|1=Goryō Shrine (Hayama Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489362}} - Located in Nagai, [[Hayama Town]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Yokosuka City)|ja|御霊神社 (横須賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Yokosuka City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504398|1=Goryō Shrine (Yokosuka City)}} - Located in Sahara, Yokosuka City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja|御霊社 (横浜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504400|1=Goryō Shrine (Yokohama City)}} - Located in Tanimachi, Sakae Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kanai, Yokohama)|ja|御霊神社 (横浜市栄区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kanai, Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504402|1=Goryō Shrine (Kanai, Yokohama)}} - Located in Kanai Town, Sakae Ward, Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Izumi Ward, Yokohama)|ja|御霊神社 (横浜市泉区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Izumi Ward, Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504404|1=Goryō Shrine (Izumi Ward, Yokohama)}} - Located in Nakada, [[Izumi Ward, Yokohama|Izumi Ward]], Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kaizu City)|ja|御霊神社 (海津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kaizu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504409|1=Goryō Shrine (Kaizu City)}} - Located in Hirata Town, Kaizu City, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. Enshrines {{ill|Ōkuninushi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主|1=Ōkuninushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q276944}}. == Kinki Region == * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Toriikawa, Ōtsu)|ja|御霊神社 (大津市鳥居川町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Toriikawa, Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504413|1=Goryō Shrine (Toriikawa, Ōtsu)}} – {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|qid=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu|1=Ōtsu}}, Toriikawa-chō: Enshrines {{ill|Emperor Kōbun|en|Emperor Kōbun|qid=Q357242|lt=Emperor Kōbun|1=Emperor Kōbun}}. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Ōe, Ōtsu)|ja|御霊神社 (大津市大江)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Ōe, Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504421|1=Goryō Shrine (Ōe, Ōtsu)}} – Shiga Prefecture, Ōtsu, Ōe: Enshrines '''Prince Ōtomo''' ({{ill|Ōtomo no Miko|ja|大友皇子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo no Miko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}). * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kitaōji, Ōtsu)|ja|御霊神社 (大津市北大路)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kitaōji, Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504425|1=Goryō Shrine (Kitaōji, Ōtsu)}} – Shiga Prefecture, Ōtsu, Kitaōji: Enshrines '''Emperor Kōbun'''. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Nangō, Ōtsu)|ja|御霊神社 (大津市南郷)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Nangō, Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504430|1=Goryō Shrine (Nangō, Ōtsu)}} – Shiga Prefecture, Ōtsu, Nangō: Enshrines '''Minister of the Right, Kibi-no-Kimi''' ({{ill|Kibi no Makibi|en|Kibi no Makibi|qid=Q1063276|lt=Kibi no Makibi|1=Kibi no Makibi}}). * {{ill|Kami-Goryō Shrine|ja|上御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Goryō Shrine|1=Kamigoryō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359018}} – {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kamigyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Kamigyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1321824|lt=Kamigyō-ku|1=Kamigyō-ku, Kyoto}}, Kami-Goryō Tatemachi: '''Official name: Goryō Shrine''' (御靈神社). * {{ill|Shimo-Goryō Shrine|ja|下御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimo-Goryō Shrine|qq=}} – Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto, {{ill|Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1075455|lt=Nakagyō-ku|1=Nakagyō-ku, Kyoto}}, Shimo-Goryōmae-chō. * {{ill|Kami-Katsura Goryō Shrine|ja|上桂御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Katsura Goryō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504434|1=Kami-Katsura Goryō Shrine}} – Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto, {{ill|Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto|qid=Q1154588|lt=Nishikyō-ku|1=Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto}}, Kami-Katsura Nishii-chō. * {{ill|Shimo-Katsura Goryō Shrine|ja|下桂御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimo-Katsura Goryō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504440|1=Shimo-Katsura Goryō Shrine}} – Kyoto Prefecture, Kyoto, Nishikyō-ku, Katsura Hisakata-chō. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kamo, Kizugawa)|ja|御霊神社 (木津川市加茂町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kamo, Kizugawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504445|1=Goryō Shrine (Kamo, Kizugawa)}} – Kyoto Prefecture, {{ill|Kizugawa, Kyoto|en|Kizugawa, Kyoto|qid=Q990352|lt=Kizugawa, Kyoto|1=Kizugawa, Kyoto}}, Kamo: Former '''Tōmyō-ji Temple'''. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Miyano-ura, Kizugawa)|ja|御霊神社 (木津川市木津宮ノ裏)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Miyano-ura, Kizugawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504448|1=Goryō Shrine (Miyano-ura, Kizugawa)}} – Kyoto Prefecture, Kizugawa, Miyano-ura. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|ja|御霊神社 (福知山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Fukuchiyama)|qq=}} – Kyoto Prefecture, {{ill|Fukuchiyama, Kyoto|en|Fukuchiyama, Kyoto|qid=Q3355306|lt=Fukuchiyama|1=Fukuchiyama, Kyoto}}, Nishinaka-no-chō. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Kameoka)|ja|御霊神社 (亀岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Kameoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504450|1=Goryō Shrine (Kameoka)}} – Kyoto Prefecture, {{ill|Kameoka, Kyoto|en|Kameoka, Kyoto|qid=Q633996|lt=Kameoka|1=Kameoka, Kyoto}}, Hiedano-chō. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Osaka)|ja|御霊神社 (大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Osaka)|qq=}} – {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}, {{ill|Chūō-ku, Osaka|ja|中央区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūō-ku, Osaka|1=Chūōku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20652290}}, {{ill|Awaji-machi, Osaka|ja|淡路町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awaji-machi, Osaka|1=Awaji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11559827}}. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Sanda)|ja|御霊神社 (三田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Sanda)|1=Goryō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489358}} – {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, {{ill|Sanda, Hyōgo|en|Sanda, Hyōgo|qid=Q847607|lt=Sanda, Hyōgo|1=Sanda, Hyōgo}}, Kishi. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Nara)|ja|御霊神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Nara)|qq=}} – {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara, Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, Yakushidō-chō: Enshrines {{ill|Princess Inoe|en|Princess Inoe|qid=Q7244649|lt=Princess Inoue|1=Princess Inoe}} and {{ill|Tachibana no Hayanari|en|Tachibana no Hayanari|qid=Q1062686|lt=Tachibana no Naramaro|1=Tachibana no Hayanari}}, among others. Also known as '''Nanto Goryō Shrine''' (南都御霊神社). * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Reianji, Gojō)|ja|御霊神社 (五條市霊安寺町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Reianji, Gojō)|1=Goryō Shrine (Reianji-chō)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30924976}} – Nara Prefecture, {{ill|Gojō, Nara|en|Gojō, Nara|qid=Q602571|lt=Gojō, Nara|1=Gojō, Nara}}, Reianji-chō: Also called '''Goryō Hongū''' (御霊本宮). Enshrines '''Princess Inoue''' and others. There are '''20 branch shrines''' throughout Gojō City (former '''Uchi District'''). * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Nakanochō, Gojō)|ja|御霊神社 (五條市中之町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Nakanochō, Gojō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504451|1=Goryō Shrine (Nakanochō, Gojō)}} – Nara Prefecture, Gojō, Nakanochō: '''Branch shrine of Reianji-chō Goryō Shrine'''. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Hidaka)|ja|御霊神社 (日高町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Hidaka)|1=Goryō Shrine (Hidaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489359}} – {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hidaka District, Wakayama|ja|日高郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hidaka District, Wakayama|1=Hidaka District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q860140}}, {{ill|Hidaka, Wakayama|ja|日高町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hidaka, Wakayama|1=Hidakachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q854578}}, Koura. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Aritagawa)|ja|御霊神社 (有田川町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Aritagawa)|qq=}} – Wakayama Prefecture, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|en|Arida District, Wakayama|qid=Q1131181|lt=Arida District, Wakayama|1=Arida District, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|Aridagawa, Wakayama|qid=Q1345889|lt=Aritagawa|1=Aridagawa, Wakayama}}, Shō.
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Mihara Village)|ja|御霊神社 (三原村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Mihara Village)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504453|1=Goryō Shrine (Mihara Village)}} - Located in [[Mihara Village]], [[Hata District]], {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|qid=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Goryō Shrine (Anan City)|ja|御霊神社 (阿南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Anan City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504455|1=Goryō Shrine (Anan City)}} - Located in Nakajima, [[Naka River Town]], [[Anan City]], {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.
{{disambiguation}}
